reflection.candidate_lesson: Trades that must be RECONSTRUCTED from the fills ledger (no log_forex_decision() call) are structurally blind and should be treated as UNRELIABLE — 6 of 7 such trades lost (WR=14%, avg R=-0.011).
reflection.mechanism: When the entry path bypasses log_forex_decision(), it means the trade fired outside the vetted signal pipeline — no commitment_score, no VIX gate, no rate_diff_z check, no session filter ran. These are orphaned fills from a code path that skips every one of the Six Tenets' gates, so they entered with zero regime-appropriateness or health verification. The single win (USD_JPY +1.92R) is survivorship noise, not edge.
reflection.testable_rule: if decision.why_this_trade.startswith('RECONSTRUCTED') or decision.signal_layers_active == []: flag UNRELIABLE, block auto-execution, require pipeline re-entry with populated commitment_score before sizing.

validation.reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
